{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Void Snare
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Void Snare]] is a technique inside [[Lindon]]'s purple bracelet.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Void Snare]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]] that uses purple lines.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
